## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123 or Refs #456 -->

## Type of change

<!-- Match your PR title to one of these (see CONTRIBUTING.md). If you use squash merge, the PR title becomes the commit on main and drives Release Please. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` / `ci` / `build` / `refactor` / `perf` / `test` / `style` — other (describe below)

**PR title (Conventional Commits):** `type: description` — e.g. `feat: add export for GeoTIFF`

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? e.g. manual steps in QGIS, `./run_tests.sh` -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pre-commit` (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/iceye-ltd/iceye-qgis-plugins/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#git-hooks)) and addressed any failures.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/iceye-ltd/iceye-qgis-plugins/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] If this changes UI, I added screenshots or notes for reviewers.
